sentences.text: Hey, Trisha!
Hello, how's it going?
It's going, how are you?
Good, thanks for asking!
What's new?
I feel like I'm just, like, still catching up.
We went to the RealPage conference, like, a week ago.
Okay, how was that?
I'm still recovering.
But it was a lot of fun.
It was in Vegas, it was my first RealPage conference.
Nice.
So yeah, it was good.
We got to see a bunch of people we work with, a bunch of other vendors, and… yeah, we got to see the Backstreet Boys, which was awesome.
No way!
Did you go to the Sphere?
We did, yeah, it was….
Oh, you gotta tell me, how cool was the sphere?
Oh my gosh.
Well, first of all, have you been?
No, but I want to go to the sphere.
Okay, because.
I'm not a Vegas lover, to be honest with you, but the sphere just looks so cool.
Same, yeah, I'm not a big fan of Vegas, but yeah, I just wanted to experience it, especially Backstreet Boys.
But, I guess I didn't do enough research going into it, but, like, I guess the best place to sit is, like, kind of, like, in the 300 row.
Okay.

I bought it in the 100 row, and then if you're, like, far back in that 100 row, then you, I guess there's, like, an obstructed view, just because the second row awning is, like, kind of above you, and so you can't, like, get the full experience.
to the view, yeah.
But I guess it's good if you have… you get, like, motion sickness, but I don't.
So, yeah, that's something that I'll remember for next time.
That's so cool, but it was, it was still good.
Oh my gosh, yeah, it was so good.
Are you going to OpTech?
… I don't think so.
When is that?
Is that next month?
It's, November, like, 17, 18, and 19, I think?
Or, like, somewhere around that time?
I don't believe so.
I bet Char, who is our president, I bet she's gonna go.
Yeah, yeah.
I know, I might be going to it, I'm not 100% sure, but it's in Vegas this year.
But if I go, I might have to, like, find a way to… I just want to, like, go to the sphere to just experience the sphere.
Oh, yeah.
Yeah.
But didn't the Backtree Boys just extend their, like.
They're, like, having a residency there, aren't they?
Yeah, so it… the past… or, like, this past weekend was their last one, but they just extended it, last weekend of December, and then I believe they just added more dates in February, so my sister….
Okay, what's playing at this fair?
Maybe we could change your mind on… coming to OpTech.
Let's see what we got during OpTech.
The 17th to the 19th, I think, is OpTech.
Let's search the shows.
I think, is that… I wonder if the Backstreet Boys are still there.
P.
Oh gosh, I don't even know how to look, it looks like there's, like, a million things happening.
I'm just curious what will be there when I am there, because I would love to just go check it out.
The Wizard of Oz?
Is that right?
That's… that's not what I want to see at the Sphere.
November… what did I say?
We're looking at… yeah, The Wizard of Oz.
Interesting.
It's not what I had in mind, Trisha.
I saw Kenny Chesney was, like, at the Sphere at one point, I was like, that would have been cool to see as well.
Oh, yeah, Char also saw that one.
He was there for Apartments.
com or something?
Okay, really?
Yeah, it was one of their… events.
Very cool.
So what's new on the… on the front Google business?
How's everything going?
I know that you're… so I know we… last we talked, it sounds like you're in contract with Zumpert through the end of March, correct?
Yeah, we are.
Yeah, and that still looks to be the case.
Okay.
I know you said that Char was open to the switch, so would that still be… is that still kind of accurate, or are you still open to the idea of switching once that contract's up?
Yeah, once that contract's up, then yes, I would definitely be open.
I know that we utilize Zemper for, like, I guess they have, like, an ILS type of… situation as well.
I know that we get, some pretty good discounts if we hit, like, a certain threshold, so I would just have to crunch the numbers on our side.
Because even, you know, the discounted GBP is higher than what y'all would charge us, right?
And so, yeah, once we get to that point, I'll just have to crunch numbers and see what we can do to still get that ILS discount, and then add you guys into the equation as well.
Cool, yeah.
Yeah, we got you… I got you down to $115 for… it's like the… you have 38 properties, right?
Correct.
Yeah, and then if you wanted to do social, I discounted that from, like, way down to $35 a month, the property.
Is social on your radar still?
So we just signed with, Opinion, just because they have that platform to where, like.
on-time managers can just go in there and just post, and then I can approve.
Okay.
So yeah, we just signed that, I want to say.
the… Is the approval process what kind of brought you to do Opinion, because you wanted to be able to approve their content?

Yeah, just for, like, the first… Because you never know with our sites, so… could be, like, grammatical issues, and… content issues, things like that, and so I just wanted to have eyes on it and just hold a little bit more autonomy, for maybe the first 6 months to a year, and then I think eventually I'd build that trust to just Give them the keys.
Does Opinion do any automated posting for you?
They do, so they'll… they do, like, two just AI posts per week, just to supplement that organic posting.
Okay.
Yeah.
So they do two automated a week, and then you're having them supplemented.
Correct.
Gotcha.
Do you mind me asking what Pinion charges for that?
I believe it was $1.
25 per month?
Okay.
And do you use them for anything else?
We do.
So we use them for, obviously, just, like, overall feedback, so reputation management, as well as the surveys.
Okay.
So I think they probably gave us a good deal.
Yeah, okay.

Yeah, I know I was gonna bundle that into your Google package for just the additional 35, which we have the dash… we have the two times a week automated posts, and then we have the dashboard for them to post.
We just don't have the functionality for you to, like, have… like, to go in and approve it.
Got it.
But, so, you know, but we can certainly strip that and just do the Google at $115.
Okay.
If that's the… yeah, that's the route that you want to go.
Or maybe, you know, are you locked into opinion for… is it a year contract?
So, I don't know what the pinion, what the contract looks like, but I can definitely find that out.
I believe either Hannah or Char signed that one before I started.
Oh, okay, okay, so you… so that wasn't since we talked, that was before?
Yeah.
Gotcha.

Okay, that makes sense, because I was just like, oh, I think… you know, I know we talked about social, and we could… we could have definitely done better with the price, which I know is a big thing for you guys, but it was already in the… in the works before.

Yeah, let me know, I mean, if… if… if… if the agreement coincides at all with, like, when Sumper's up, we can definitely bundle in our social at much less than $125 a property, and it sounds like… it's similar, so, you know, the way that our social works is it's integrated with your syndication feed, just the way that Google is, and then it runs through the large language model to be able to put out the property-specific content.
So our cadence is also twice a week, and then we have a backend that they can post, they can post through the backend.
But just, this is what the social content looks like, so they get, like, a community amenity.

In-unit amenity, floor plan, highlights, and then they get holiday posts, lifestyle posts, … PetPost, so it's like a twice-a-week cadence for that, and then, … In addition to that, we also have our backend, and they can post content right through the backend as well.
Got it.
So, you know, where they can go into this backend.

This backend, this was for Google too, but it basically gives you visibility into whatever the content that's going out for that day is, by channel, by property, and then there's this new post section where you can select your property, or all your properties, and schedule out content.

As well, so… If, if you do find that your contract with… and if you like opinion, that's totally fine as well, but we do have the option where we can bundle this with the Google package at less than that $125 a property rate.
Got it.
Okay.
I'll definitely let you know how it goes.
I know that, … It's, like, relatively new.
But even… even in the future, if your team decides to add in that little approval process, I think that's something that we'd definitely be interested in.

I'm gonna actually… once we get off, I'm actually gonna bring it up to our team again, because it's something that's come up quite a bit, … from other partners, well, actually, even just before this call, like, the ability to approve.

The, like, kind of funky workaround that we have is because they can schedule a content piece out, they can schedule it out, and then you can go in and see what's scheduled, but obviously that's a lot different than being you know, pinged once they put something in, like, you'd have to say, okay, like, at the beginning of every week, I'm gonna go in and look at the scheduled content to make sure that I'm okay with it.

But it is nice that they can post through the backend, so they don't have to have, like, native access to your Facebook and Instagram, they can do bulk posting, and then we could also set the parameters, so, like, if you only want a property manager to be able to post to their properties, they can only see their property in this backend, and have the ability to post to that one property, or however Many properties they manage.
Yeah, that's great.
And then from a Google perspective, I don't know if there's too much new from last we spoke.
I think I showed you the amenities, correct?
Correct, yes, you should do that.

And I know we highlighted some of the differences just with the keyword within brand language capabilities, the amenities, the concession, and then the Q&A being updated daily, and then that back end, just from, like, a zumper standpoint.

But if there is any interest in locking in the price, you know, I think I mentioned this to you last time, we're happy to delay the billing out till April 1st, and then we can start implementing, like, come March as your Zumper contract comes up, so… If that's something that you guys are interested in, we can certainly… we can certainly push that billing out for you.
Okay, yeah, sounds good.
But let's… let's kinda… let's get some time on the calendar as we get a little closer, … So you're in March, right?
Yes.
Got a while, huh?
August, September, October.
Do you want to re… plan to reconnect sometime in October?

We just… sometimes we have new updates and, you know, things about the product, so at least if we can keep the conversation going as we head up, you know, as you get closer to that contract date, you know, you'll be in the loop with everything that we have going on.
But if you want, we can maybe… do you want to meet, like, the first week in November?
First week of November, let's see….
Or actually, first week of November?
Am I out the first week of November?
I'm out the first week in November, even the week of the 17th, or….
Thank you.
I'm out the 1st to the 8th, so….
I can do… 17th or 18th.
Yeah, let's do that.
Let's do the 18th.
Okay.
Any certain time work for you?
I have pretty much everything open except for 11 and 3 and 4.
Gonna do….
You're in Eastern, right?
I'm on Eastern, yeah.
Can we do 2PM your time?
2PM my timing….
Oh, actually, just kidding, 3PM your time.
3PM my time?
Could you do 3.
Or can you do… what… are you… you're on…
Pacific, right?
Central.
Let's see.
I can't do 3… let's see….
How about 10, which is… oh, no, that's a little early for you, 10.
I can do 10.
You wanna do 10?
Yeah.
So that's 9-year time?
Yeah.
Okay.
At, on Tuesday the 18th, right?
Yes.
Perfect.

That way I'll keep you in the loop, and I'll keep you in the loop anyways, but, you know, we can talk about any updates at that point, see how, you know, see where you're trending with the contract and whatnot, and we can go from there.
Okay, perfect, that sounds good.
Alright, well, if anything comes up, keep me in the loop, otherwise we'll chat soon, and enjoy, enjoy your long weekend.
Awesome, thank you, you too.
Bye.
